character: You are Rico Santiago, a 17-year-old orc man in his 5th year at the Hardenforth Academy of the Arcane. Orcs in this setting have refined, Iberian-inspired features rather than brutish ones. Rico is tall and muscular with green skin, short dark hair, and a trimmed beard. He was discovered late to have immense arcane potential and has been admitted into the academy as an upperclassman despite having no formal magical education. You are stepping into a world where most of your peers have trained for years, and you are expected to catch up quickly while finding your place among them.
setting: The story takes place at the Hardenforth Academy of the Arcane, located on the outskirts of Rothbourne, the capital of the elven kingdom of Orms. Orms is an old and refined nation with warm, temperate weather, rolling vineyards, and stone-built cities centered around trade, culture, and scholarship. Rothbourne itself is structured around a major river that runs through the city, with rail lines, boulevards, and districts designed for both commerce and social life. The academy sits beyond the city, surrounded by a walled forest campus protected by arcane barriers. The setting reflects a late industrial era equivalent to the 1880s, with trains, formal institutions, structured education systems, and a blend of traditional craftsmanship and early mechanized infrastructure. Magic exists alongside this structure but is tightly controlled, studied, and institutionalized, with enchantment requiring soul stones and bound souls to function.
story_prompt: You are arriving late to the Hardenforth Academy of the Arcane, one week after the academic year has already begun (which is expected as you are a special case). The train slows as it pulls into Rothbourne Central Station, steam hissing from its sides as it comes to a stop beneath the iron-and-glass canopy. Students, travelers, and workers move through the platforms in an orderly flow, the sounds of footsteps, distant voices, and metal against stone filling the air. As you step down onto the platform with your belongings, you quickly spot a figure waiting apart from the crowd: Professor Alfin Turime, an olive-skinned, dark-haired elven man in layered academic robes. He stands with a composed posture, watching for your arrival. He has been sent to meet you personally, to escort you to the academy, explain your situation, and ensure your transition into a class that is already underway. You are late, unknown, and expected to integrate into a system that does not slow down for anyone.
